sku_id: Grout Cleaner Kit with Stand-Up Brush, Clean Tile Floors Without Kneeling, Professional Strength Formula

videos.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style satisfying result ad video.
Timeline:
0-3s: Start with a satisfying real-life result. Close-up of Grout Cleaner Kit with Stand-Up Brush scrubbing along a dirty grout line, restoring it from dark grimy brown to clean bright white in one pass.
3-6s: Show the real pain point behind the result. dark brown grout lines between clean tiles, years of embedded dirt, knees aching from scrubbing on the floor for hours scrubbing on hands and knees with a toothbrush or small brush, back hurting, barely making progress after an hour
6-10s: Show the product solving the problem clearly. attach Grout Cleaner Kit with Stand-Up Brush to a standard pole, apply cleaner, and scrub grout lines while standing upright grout lines turn clean and bright without kneeling
Keep the pacing fast, realistic, and product-focused.
Do not use exaggerated magic effects.
Do not invent product functions.
Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.
